subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Medical vs Trauma Emergencies
description: Learn Medical vs Trauma Emergencies in one minute.

hook.text: A car crash victim and a stroke patient both need help—but for very different reasons.

buildup.text: Trauma emergencies come from physical force: falls, crashes, burns, or stab wounds.

discovery.text: Medical emergencies arise inside the body: heart attacks, strokes, diabetic crises.

twist.text: The distinction matters because treatment priorities differ dramatically between them.

climax.text: Trauma needs bleeding control and immobilization. Medical needs assessment and monitoring.

punchline.text: Know what caused it and you'll know what to do.

quiz.question: Which is a medical emergency rather than a trauma emergency?
options: A broken arm from a fall
